role: Minister of Agriculture (2009–2013); later Governor of Khuzestan
bio: Sadegh Khalilian is an Iranian economist and politician who served as Minister of Agriculture Jihad in [Mahmoud Ahmadinejad](/people/mahmoud-ahmadinejad)'s second cabinet from 2009 to 2013, confirmed by the [Islamic Consultative Assembly](/orgs/islamic-consultative-assembly) on 3 September 2009. An academic by training, Khalilian was born in Ahvaz and later served as Governor of Khuzestan province.
editorial_notes: Born 1959 in Ahvaz. Economist/academic. Agriculture Minister 2009-2013 under Ahmadinejad. Later Governor of Khuzestan.
